title: Ore Oru Lyrics All In All Azhagu Raja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ore Oru
Singer(s): Javed Ali
Movie: All In All Azhagu Raja
Music: Thamman S
Lyrics: Na Muthukumar

Ore oru varam thandhal enna penney
inbam thunbam ellaam ini undhan pinney
iru puram siragulla

azhagiya dhevadhai paarkudhey
idhu enna idhayathil idi mazhai puyal
vandhu thaakudhey

Kannukulley..
serthuvacha kanavugal ellaam ippo kalayudhey
Nenjukulle
pooti vacha aasaiyellaam unna paarthu odayudhey

yaaro nee yaaro
unnaala tholanjen naanu enna seiya, enna solla

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ore Oru'?

'Ore Oru' conveys the feelings of love and the joy it brings, highlighting the beauty of companionship.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In All In All Azhagu Raja, this song reflects the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer of 'Ore Oru'?

The song is sung by the talented Javed Ali, known for his melodious voice and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Ore Oru' was composed by Thaman S, who is renowned for his catchy and vibrant compositions.

When was 'Ore Oru' released?

'Ore Oru' was released on October 23, 2013, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Ore Oru' from All In All Azhagu Raja encapsulates the essence of romantic love, portraying the bliss and challenges that come with it. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and joy. Javed Ali's captivating vocals bring the emotions to life, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. The track beautifully complements the film's narrative, enhancing the connection between the characters.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ore Oru from All In All Azhagu Raja is a mesmerizing romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Javed Ali's soulful vocals and Thaman S's enchanting music, this song creates an unforgettable vibe that resonates with listeners. Dive into the lyrical magic penned by Na Muthukumar, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: You have given me a blessing, my dear; now all happiness and sorrow will stay behind you.
Look at the beautiful goddess; what is this in my heart? A rainstorm has come and filled it.
All the dreams that I have gathered in my eyes are now fading away. All the desires I have hidden in my heart are flowing away when I see you.
Who are you? Because of you, I am lost; what should I do, what should I say?
